en.title: Best Mushroom Coffee 2026
en.description: I ranked the mushroom coffees worth buying in 2026, from MUD/WTR and Four Sigmatic to RYZE and Everyday Dose, scored on taste, sustained energy, blend, and value per cup.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳機能蘑菇咖啡排行榜
zh-tw.description: 我實測 2026 值得買的機能蘑菇咖啡，從 MUD/WTR、Four Sigmatic 到 RYZE、Everyday Dose，依口味、穩定能量、配方與每杯性價比評分。

en.description: A cacao and masala chai base with six functional mushrooms and just 35mg of caffeine per cup, which delivers the smoothest sustained energy of anything I tested with no jitters and no afternoon crash.

zh-tw.description: 可可加印度香料茶底，混六種機能蘑菇，每杯只有 35 毫克咖啡因，是我測過喝起來最順、能量最穩的一款，完全沒有手抖也沒有下午的崩潰感，一罐約一千兩百出頭。

competitors.name: Focus Ground Coffee with Lion's Mane

en.description: Real ground arabica blended with lion's mane and chaga, brewed in a normal drip machine, which gives ex-espresso drinkers the full coffee taste and caffeine they actually want plus the focus boost.

zh-tw.description: 真正的研磨阿拉比卡咖啡豆混獅鬃菇與白樺茸，用一般滴漏咖啡機就能煮，喝慣現煮咖啡的人會最有共鳴，咖啡味跟咖啡因都到位，還多了專注感，一包約九百多。

en.description: Six adaptogenic mushrooms in one instant scoop at roughly $1.20 a cup, which is the widest functional stack you can buy and the best benefit-per-dollar of any blend I ranked.

zh-tw.description: 一匙即溶就有六種適應原蘑菇，每杯換算約台幣三十幾塊，機能堆疊全榜最廣，CP 值也是我排下來最高的一款，懶人沖泡族首選。

en.description: Tastes the closest to a regular cup of coffee of anything here, with collagen protein, lion's mane and chaga extracts, L-theanine and a reduced 45mg caffeine for a calm, smooth lift.

zh-tw.description: 全榜喝起來最接近一般咖啡的一款，加了膠原蛋白、獅鬃菇與白樺茸萃取、L-茶胺酸，咖啡因降到 45 毫克，提神很溫和，新手從一般咖啡過渡過來最沒壓力，一罐約一千四。

en.description: Packs 2,000mg of organic lion's mane and cordyceps per serving, double what most rivals dose, from a brand that grows its own mushrooms in California for full supply-chain control.

zh-tw.description: 每份塞進 2,000 毫克有機獅鬃菇與冬蟲夏草，劑量是多數對手的兩倍，而且品牌在加州自己種菇，從源頭到成品都自家掌控，料實在的人會買單，一罐約八百多。

en.description: Full-caffeine organic ground coffee with chaga, cordyceps, lion's mane and maitake built in, which is the pick for athletes who want a normal strong brew without giving up the caffeine kick.

zh-tw.description: 正常咖啡因的有機研磨咖啡，內建白樺茸、冬蟲夏草、獅鬃菇與舞菇，想要一杯夠濃又不犧牲咖啡因的運動族最適合，沖出來就是一杯正常的濃咖啡，一包約七百出頭。

en.description: An instant blend stacked with lion's mane, chaga, plus a B-vitamin and D3 complex, which makes it the most vitamin-fortified option here for anyone treating their morning cup as a daily supplement.

zh-tw.description: 即溶配方加了獅鬃菇、白樺茸，還補了一整組 B 群與 D3，是全榜維他命補得最滿的一款，把早上那杯當成每日保健品在喝的人會喜歡，一袋約九百多。

en.description: An all-in-one instant latte with arabica, reishi, lion's mane, ashwagandha and built-in oat and coconut creamer that froths like a coffee-shop latte, so you just add hot water and stir.

zh-tw.description: 一沖就有奶泡的即溶拿鐵，阿拉比卡咖啡混靈芝、獅鬃菇、南非醉茄，燕麥與椰子奶精都已經調進去，沖熱水攪一攪就有咖啡店拿鐵的綿密感，懶得自己打奶泡的人很方便，一盒約九百多。

en.description: Seven superfood mushrooms in a low-caffeine organic instant blend at one of the lowest per-cup prices here, which makes it the easiest budget entry point for a first-time mushroom coffee buyer.

zh-tw.description: 七種超級食物蘑菇做成低咖啡因有機即溶，每杯單價是全榜數一數二便宜，第一次想試試看蘑菇咖啡又怕踩雷的人，從這款入門最沒負擔，一罐約六百出頭。

en.description: Organic ground coffee dosed with 1,000mg of dual-extracted lion's mane and chaga per cup, with third-party testing on every batch, which earns it the trust of buyers who scrutinise extract quality.

zh-tw.description: 有機研磨咖啡，每杯加 1,000 毫克雙重萃取的獅鬃菇與白樺茸，每批都送第三方檢驗，很在意萃取品質與檢驗報告的人會放心，一包約七百出頭。

references.title: Everyday Dose vs. RYZE vs. MUD/WTR vs. Four Sigmatic: Which Mushroom Coffee Wins?
The Best Mushroom Coffee Brands of 2026 (Tested by a Dietitian)
Best Mushroom Coffee: Our Top 6 in 2026

en.commentary: Mushroom coffee crossed over from wellness niche to grocery-aisle mainstream this year, and after weeks of swapping it for my regular brew I have firm opinions on who earns the money. MUD/WTR takes the top spot because it solves the one problem that matters most: it tastes good enough to drink every single morning. The cacao and masala chai base hides the earthiness most blends fail to mask, and at 35mg of caffeine I get a clean, level lift that lasts until lunch with zero crash. Four Sigmatic earns second by respecting coffee drinkers. It is real ground arabica you brew in your own machine, so the taste and caffeine arrive at full strength with lion's mane riding along. RYZE is the value champion at roughly $1.20 a cup with six mushrooms in every instant scoop, and it is the one I recommend to anyone who wants the widest functional stack for the least money. Everyday Dose is the smartest on-ramp for someone leaving regular coffee, since it tastes the most like the cup they already know. The rest split by purpose: Om doses the most mushroom per serving, Laird keeps full caffeine for athletes, and Pella is the cheapest way to find out if you even like the category. Buy for how you actually drink coffee, and one of the top four will fit.

highlights.title: MUD/WTR wins because you will actually finish the bag
highlights.body: The single biggest reason mushroom coffee ends up in the back of the cupboard is taste, and MUD/WTR is the one blend I never had to force down. The cacao and masala chai foundation gives it a warm, spiced flavor that reads as a treat rather than a supplement, and the 35mg of caffeine produces a steady focus that held through my afternoons without the spike-and-crash of regular coffee. A blend you enjoy is a blend you keep drinking, and that is what makes it worth the top rank.

highlights.title: RYZE is the value pick and it is not close
highlights.body: At around $1.20 per cup RYZE delivers six adaptogenic mushrooms in a single instant scoop, the widest functional stack on this list for the lowest cost per serving. The taste is mild and slightly nutty rather than rich, but for anyone whose priority is maximum mushroom benefit per dollar, the math points straight here. It is also the easiest to make: one scoop, hot water, done.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic is the choice for people who love coffee
highlights.body: Every other top pick is an instant powder. Four Sigmatic Focus is real ground arabica with lion's mane and chaga blended in, brewed in your normal drip machine. That means the coffee taste and the caffeine arrive at full strength, which is exactly what an ex-espresso drinker wants. If giving up a proper cup of coffee is the reason you have avoided this category, this is the bridge.

highlights.title: Everyday Dose is the gentlest switch from regular coffee
highlights.body: Everyday Dose tastes the closest to a standard cup of anything I tried, which makes it the blend I hand to skeptics. It layers in collagen protein, lion's mane and chaga extracts, and L-theanine alongside a reduced 45mg of caffeine, so the energy comes on calm and even. For someone nervous about the earthy mushroom flavor, this removes the excuse.

highlights.title: Match the brand to how you drink, not to the hype
highlights.body: These blends genuinely serve different drinkers. Want the most mushroom per scoop? Om doses 2,000mg a serving. Need full caffeine for training? Laird keeps it. Just testing the waters on a budget? Pella is the cheapest cup here. The mistake is buying the loudest brand instead of the one that fits your morning, so decide what you actually want from the cup first.

zh-tw.commentary: 機能蘑菇咖啡今年正式從養生小眾走進一般人的購物車，我連續幾週拿它取代每天那杯咖啡，對誰值得買心裡有底了。MUD/WTR 拿第一，因為它解決了最關鍵的一件事，就是好喝到你願意每天早上都來一杯。可可加印度香料茶的底把多數蘑菇咖啡那股土味壓得很乾淨，35 毫克咖啡因給的是一路撐到中午、不會崩潰的穩定提神感。Four Sigmatic 排第二，因為它最懂喝咖啡的人，這是真的研磨阿拉比卡豆，用自己家的咖啡機就能煮，咖啡味跟咖啡因都是足量的，再帶上獅鬃菇。RYZE 是性價比之王，每杯換算約台幣三十幾塊就有六種蘑菇，想用最少的錢拿到最廣機能堆疊的人，我直接推這款。Everyday Dose 最適合剛要從一般咖啡過渡的人，它喝起來最像你本來那杯。剩下的就看你的需求分流，Om 每份蘑菇劑量最高，Laird 給運動族足量咖啡因，Pella 是最便宜的試水溫選擇。照你平常怎麼喝咖啡來買，前四名裡一定有一款合你。

highlights.title: MUD/WTR 第一，是因為你真的會把整罐喝完
highlights.body: 蘑菇咖啡會被冰在櫥櫃深處，最大原因就是難喝，而 MUD/WTR 是唯一一款我從來不用硬逼自己吞的。可可加印度香料茶的底給它一種溫暖帶香料的味道，喝起來像享受而非吃保健品，35 毫克咖啡因撐住整個下午的專注，也沒有一般咖啡那種衝高再崩的落差。一款你喝得開心的咖啡才會一直喝下去，這就是它值得第一的理由。

highlights.title: RYZE 是性價比首選，而且差距明顯
highlights.body: 每杯約台幣三十幾塊，RYZE 一匙即溶就給你六種適應原蘑菇，是全榜機能堆疊最廣、每份成本最低的一款。味道偏溫和帶點堅果香，不算濃郁，但如果你最在意的是每塊錢換到多少蘑菇好處，算盤一打就是它。沖泡也最簡單，一匙、熱水，搞定。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 是給愛喝咖啡的人準備的
highlights.body: 其他幾個前段班都是即溶粉，Four Sigmatic Focus 是真的研磨阿拉比卡豆混獅鬃菇與白樺茸，用你家一般滴漏機就能煮。這代表咖啡味跟咖啡因都是足量到位的，這正是喝慣現煮咖啡的人要的。如果你一直不碰這個品類就是因為捨不得那杯像樣的咖啡，這款就是你的橋。

highlights.title: Everyday Dose 是從一般咖啡換過來最溫和的一款
highlights.body: Everyday Dose 喝起來是我試過最接近一般咖啡的，所以我都拿它給半信半疑的朋友試。它加了膠原蛋白、獅鬃菇與白樺茸萃取、L-茶胺酸，咖啡因降到 45 毫克，提神來得很平穩。怕那股土味蘑菇感的人，這款幫你把藉口拿掉了。

highlights.title: 照你怎麼喝來挑，別跟著聲量買
highlights.body: 這些配方是真的服務不同的人。想要每匙蘑菇最多？Om 每份塞 2,000 毫克。練身要足量咖啡因？Laird 留著。只是想用小錢試水溫？Pella 是全榜最便宜的一杯。最常見的錯誤就是去買聲量最大的牌子，而不是最合你早晨那杯的那款，所以先想清楚你到底要這杯給你什麼。

references.title: Best Mushroom Coffee | Our Top 6 in 2026
The Best Mushroom Coffee Brands of 2026 [Tested by a Dietitian]
MUD\WTR vs. Four Sigmatic Mushroom Coffee (I Tried Both): Who Wins In 2026?

en.commentary: MUD/WTR Rise Cacao stays my number one, and the 2026 reviews keep reinforcing why. Multiple roundups still call it the gold standard for mushroom coffee, and the blend of organic cacao, masala chai, turmeric, and six functional mushrooms delivers a rich, warming cup with just 35mg of caffeine and no earthy aftertaste. For anyone easing off heavy coffee while keeping steady focus, this is the one I hand them first. Four Sigmatic Focus holds second and earns a small blend bump this week. Reviewers keep praising its longevity since 2014 and its transparent use of fruiting body extracts, and the lion's mane and chaga pairing gives that traditional roast flavor people miss in other blends. If taste closest to real coffee is your priority, start here. Ryze keeps third as the value and smoothness pick. Testers describe it as very smooth and the closest to traditional coffee in this group, and it lands cheaper than MUD/WTR per serving, which keeps its value score high. Everyday Dose and Om Mushroom round out the upper middle, the first for its creamy, approachable taste and the second for one of the most respected functional blends here. The order is steady this week because reviewers reaffirmed the same leaders rather than reshuffling them, so I kept ranks intact and only nudged Four Sigmatic's blend score as fruiting-body sourcing kept drawing praise.

highlights.title: MUD/WTR stays the gold standard
highlights.body: 2026 roundups still crown it the benchmark. The cacao, chai, turmeric, and six-mushroom blend gives a warming cup with only 35mg caffeine and no earthy aftertaste, ideal for cutting back on coffee.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic tastes closest to coffee
highlights.body: The lion's mane and chaga dark roast keeps that traditional coffee flavor with transparent fruiting-body extracts. If you want the least adjustment from regular coffee, start here.

highlights.title: Ryze leads on value and smoothness
highlights.body: Testers call it very smooth and the closest to real coffee in this group, and it costs less per serving than MUD/WTR. That keeps its value among the highest on the list.

highlights.title: Everyday Dose for approachable taste
highlights.body: Its creamy, mild profile makes it the easiest entry point for newcomers who find other blends too earthy. A good first step into the category.

zh-tw.commentary: MUD/WTR Rise Cacao 這週繼續第一，2026 的評測一直在幫它加分。好幾家榜單還是把它當成菇菇咖啡的標竿，有機可可、瑪薩拉香料茶、薑黃加上六種功能性菇類調出來的這杯，溫潤濃郁，咖啡因只有 35mg，喝起來也沒有那股土味。想慢慢戒掉重咖啡又要維持穩定專注的人，我第一個就遞這杯給他。Four Sigmatic Focus 守住第二，這週配方分數小加分。評測一直稱讚它從 2014 年撐到現在的資歷，還有它透明使用子實體萃取，猴頭菇配上樺褐孔菌給了那種傳統烘焙的咖啡味，是別家調配常常少掉的東西。要最接近真咖啡的味道，從這款開始準沒錯。Ryze 維持第三，是 CP 值跟順口度的代表。試喝的人形容它非常滑順，是這組裡最接近傳統咖啡的，每份單價又比 MUD/WTR 便宜，所以 CP 值分數一直很高。Everyday Dose 跟 Om Mushroom 撐起中上段，前者靠奶香滑順、入門好接受，後者則是這裡最受敬重的功能性配方之一。這週排名穩定，因為評測只是再次確認同一批領先者，沒有重洗牌，所以我保留名次，只把 Four Sigmatic 的配方分數往上挪一點，因為它的子實體來源持續被稱讚。

highlights.title: MUD/WTR 還是標竿
highlights.body: 2026 榜單還是把它捧為基準。可可、香料茶、薑黃加六種菇調出溫潤一杯，咖啡因只有 35mg 又沒土味，想減咖啡的人很適合。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 最接近咖啡味
highlights.body: 猴頭菇配樺褐孔菌的深焙保留傳統咖啡味，子實體萃取也很透明。想從一般咖啡最無痛過渡，從這款開始。

highlights.title: Ryze CP 值與順口度領先
highlights.body: 試喝的人說它非常滑順，是這組最接近真咖啡的，每份單價又比 MUD/WTR 便宜。CP 值因此一直名列前茅。

highlights.title: Everyday Dose 入門最好接受
highlights.body: 奶香溫和的口感，是覺得別家太土味的新手最容易上手的起點。想踏進這個品類，這款是個好的第一步。

references.title: Best Mushroom Coffee | Our Top 6 in 2026
Everyday Dose vs. RYZE vs. MUD\WTR vs. Four Sigmatic: Which Mushroom Coffee Wins?
Best Mushroom Coffee Brands 2026: Tested & Ranked by Goal

en.commentary: MUD\WTR Rise Cacao holds my top spot, and the latest round of head-to-head testing keeps it there. Reviewers this month still call it the gold standard, praising its blend of organic cacao, masala chai, turmeric and six functional mushrooms for delivering gentle, sustained energy with no jitters and no afternoon crash. That warming, slightly spiced cup with no muddy mushroom aftertaste is exactly why I reach for it first when I want a coffee alternative that actually tastes like something I look forward to. The one knock from recent coverage is slow customer service, but that does not touch the cup itself. Four Sigmatic Focus Ground stays a strong second and remains the pick for people coming off espresso. It consistently ranks as the most highly rated brand across review platforms, and its transparent use of fruiting-body extracts plus a decade-plus track record give it real credibility, which is why I nudged its purity score up to 9.3. RYZE keeps third and earns the best value crown after recent pricing put it around the equivalent of a budget daily cup. Reviewers also singled out RYZE for the quickest, most helpful customer service, so I raised its value to 9.5. Its six-mushroom blend and creamy, beginner-friendly flavor make it the easiest on-ramp for anyone new to the category, even if it tastes a touch more mushroomy than the top two. Everyday Dose rounds out the top four with the smoothest taste of the bunch and equally helpful support. The rest of the field held position this week. These ten are all worth a try depending on whether taste, blend depth or price matters most to you.

highlights.title: MUD\WTR stays the gold standard
highlights.body: Cacao, masala chai, turmeric and six mushrooms deliver gentle all-day energy with no crash. Reviewers this month still rank it first, and the warming spiced cup is why I reach for it before anything else.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic is the ex-espresso pick
highlights.body: It consistently ranks as the most highly rated brand, with transparent fruiting-body extracts and a decade-plus track record. I raised its purity score to 9.3 to reflect that credibility.

highlights.title: RYZE wins on value and service
highlights.body: Recent pricing lands it around a budget daily cup, and reviewers called out its quick, helpful support. That earns a bump to 9.5 value and keeps it my easiest pick for beginners.

highlights.title: Everyday Dose has the smoothest taste
highlights.body: It pours the most approachable cup of the group and pairs that with genuinely helpful customer service. A great fourth pick if flavor is your top priority.

highlights.title: Pick by what matters to you
highlights.body: MUD\WTR for taste and energy, Four Sigmatic for purity, RYZE for value, Everyday Dose for smoothness. All ten are worth a try depending on your priority.

zh-tw.commentary: MUD\WTR Rise Cacao 還是穩坐我的第一名，這個月最新一輪的捉對廝殺評測也讓它守住位置。評測到現在還是叫它黃金標準，稱讚它把有機可可、印度香料茶、薑黃跟六種機能菇類調在一起，能給出溫和持久的能量，不會手抖，下午也不會突然沒電。那杯溫暖、帶點香料感、又沒有濁濁菇味餘韻的飲品，正是我想找咖啡替代品時第一個拿它的原因，因為它喝起來是我會期待的味道。最近評測唯一被嫌的點是客服回應慢，但這跟杯子裡的東西無關。Four Sigmatic Focus Ground 守住第二，還是推薦給從濃縮咖啡轉過來的人。它在各評測平台一直被評為評價最高的品牌，透明標示用子實體萃取，加上十多年的口碑，可信度很實在，所以我把它的 purity 分數調到 9.3。RYZE 守第三，最近的定價讓它每杯成本大約只要一杯平價咖啡的價錢，奪下最高 CP 王座。評測還特別點名 RYZE 客服回應最快也最幫得上忙，所以我把它的 value 調到 9.5。它的六菇配方加上奶香、對新手友善的味道，讓它成為剛接觸這個品類的人最好的入門選擇，雖然它喝起來菇味比前兩名稍微重一點。Everyday Dose 排第四，是這群裡口感最滑順的，客服也一樣好用。其他名次這週都沒動。這十款依照你最在意味道、配方深度還是價格，每一款都值得試試看。

highlights.title: MUD\WTR 還是黃金標準
highlights.body: 可可、香料茶、薑黃加六種菇，給出溫和的全天能量又不會沒電。這個月評測還是把它排第一，那杯溫暖帶香料的飲品就是我第一個拿它的原因。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 適合濃縮咖啡轉過來的人
highlights.body: 它一直被評為評價最高的品牌，透明標示子實體萃取，加上十多年口碑。我把它的 purity 分數調到 9.3 反映這份可信度。

highlights.title: RYZE 高 CP 跟客服雙贏
highlights.body: 最近定價讓每杯成本約等於一杯平價咖啡，評測也點名它客服又快又幫得上忙。這讓它的 value 調到 9.5，也守住我給新手最好上手的選擇。

highlights.title: Everyday Dose 口感最滑順
highlights.body: 它沖出這群裡最好入口的一杯，客服也很幫得上忙。如果你最看重味道，這是很棒的第四名選擇。

highlights.title: 依你的需求來挑
highlights.body: 重味道跟能量選 MUD\WTR，重純淨選 Four Sigmatic，重 CP 選 RYZE，重滑順選 Everyday Dose。這十款依你的優先順序都值得試。

references.title: Mushroom Coffee Trend In 2026
The Best Mushroom Coffee Brands of 2026 [Tested by a Dietitian]
Best Mushroom Coffee of 2026: 7 Picks Tested & Reviewed

en.commentary: No single product shook this category this week, so the rankings hold, and that is the honest call. What the latest market data confirms is the trend driving everything here. Roughly 61 percent of consumers now choose food and drinks specifically for energy and focus, and U.S. mushroom coffee sales keep growing at double-digit rates. That tailwind rewards exactly what my top picks already do well. MUD\WTR Rise stays first because it nails the hardest part of this category, sustained energy without the caffeine crash, while staying genuinely pleasant to drink. Four Sigmatic holds second on the strength of its flavor and its reputation for quality that reviewers keep calling refined rather than trendy, which matters as buyers grow more skeptical. RYZE sits third and remains the value champion, its six-mushroom blend is the most complete on this list and the price per serving is hard to argue with. The clearest message from this week's coverage is that transparency is becoming the deciding factor. Shoppers are being told to look for fruiting body extracts, declared bean origin, and published third-party testing, and the brands that already publish that data are the ones I keep recommending. If you want the safest first cup, start with RYZE for value or MUD\WTR for the smoothest energy.

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise still owns the smoothest energy
highlights.body: The whole point of mushroom coffee is steady focus without the crash, and Rise delivers that better than anything else here while staying easy to drink. That combination is why it keeps the top spot, and nothing this week gave me a reason to move it.

highlights.title: RYZE remains the value pick to beat
highlights.body: A genuine six-mushroom blend with Cordyceps, Lion's Mane, Reishi, Shiitake, Turkey Tail, and King Trumpet at a low price per serving is the strongest dollar-for-dollar case on this list. For a first-time buyer who wants the full functional spread, this is where I start them.

highlights.title: Transparency is now the real tiebreaker
highlights.body: This week's coverage pushes buyers toward fruiting body extracts, declared bean origin, and published third-party testing. The brands at the top of my list already do this, and as shoppers get more skeptical, that openness is what keeps them recommendable.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic wins on taste and trust
highlights.body: Reviewers keep describing it as refined rather than trendy, and that reputation matters when the category is flooded with newcomers. Strong flavor plus consistent quality is why it holds second over cheaper or buzzier options.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週沒有哪一款產品撼動這個類別,所以排名維持原樣,這是老實話。最新的市場數據反而印證了撐起整個榜單的趨勢。大約 61 趴的消費者現在選食物跟飲料,看的就是能不能提供能量跟專注,美國的菇菇咖啡銷量也持續雙位數成長。這股風剛好獎勵我前幾名本來就做得好的事。MUD\WTR Rise 守住第一,因為它把這個類別最難的部分做到位,持續的能量不會咖啡因崩盤,而且真的好喝。Four Sigmatic 穩坐第二,靠的是它的風味跟品質口碑,評測一直說它精緻而不只是跟風,在消費者越來越會挑的當下這點很重要。RYZE 排第三,還是 CP 值王者,六種菇菇配方是榜上最完整的,每份的價格也很難挑剔。這週報導最清楚的訊息是,透明度正在變成決勝點。文章都在教讀者看子實體萃取、產地標示跟第三方檢測報告,而那些早就公開這些數據的品牌,正是我一直在推的。想喝最穩的第一杯,看 CP 值就選 RYZE,要最順的能量就選 MUD\WTR。

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise 還是最順的能量來源
highlights.body: 菇菇咖啡的重點就是穩定專注又不崩盤,Rise 這點做得比榜上任何一款都好,而且很好入口。這個組合讓它穩坐第一,這週也沒給我換掉它的理由。

highlights.title: RYZE 還是最難打敗的 CP 值選擇
highlights.body: 蟲草、猴頭菇、靈芝、香菇、雲芝跟杏鮑菇的六種菇配方,每份價格又低,是榜上每塊錢換到最多的選擇。新手想一次拿到完整的機能配方,我都從這款開始推。

highlights.title: 透明度現在才是真正的決勝點
highlights.body: 這週的報導都在推消費者看子實體萃取、產地標示跟第三方檢測。我榜上前段的品牌早就在做這些,當消費者越來越會挑,這份公開正是讓它們繼續值得推薦的關鍵。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 靠風味跟信任取勝
highlights.body: 評測一直形容它精緻而不只是跟風,在這個一堆新品牌湧入的類別,這個口碑很重要。好風味加上穩定品質,讓它壓過更便宜或更會炒話題的對手,守住第二。

en.commentary: The mushroom coffee order held this week, and the recent round of testing reinforces why the top three sit where they do. MUD\WTR Rise Cacao keeps first, and it stays my pick for the person who wants a genuine coffee replacement rather than a coffee with mushrooms added. The cacao and masala chai base gives it a smooth, warming flavor that drinks well on its own, the six-mushroom blend is well dosed, and at 35mg of caffeine it delivers steady focus without the jitter spike. That balance is what keeps it on top. Four Sigmatic Focus Ground holds second, and it is the pick for anyone transitioning slowly, since it brews like real coffee with lion's mane and chaga folded in, and it remains the top-selling option of its kind by a wide margin. Ryze stays at third and is the value and blend standout, with a six-mushroom formula around $1.20 a serving that recent testers found mixed cleanly with little grittiness. Mushroom coffee sits outside the Prime Day cycle, so pricing held steady and merit scoring carries the week. My guidance is consistent: MUD\WTR for a full coffee swap, Four Sigmatic for an easy transition, Ryze for the strongest blend at the best price.

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise Cacao keeps first
highlights.body: A smooth cacao and chai base, a well-dosed six-mushroom blend, and 35mg of caffeine for steady focus without a jitter spike. The genuine coffee replacement.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic Focus is the easy transition
highlights.body: Second place brews like real coffee with lion's mane and chaga folded in, and it stays the top-selling option of its kind by a wide margin.

highlights.title: Ryze is the value and blend standout
highlights.body: Third place pairs a six-mushroom formula with roughly $1.20-per-serving pricing, and recent testers found it mixed cleanly with little grit.

highlights.title: Outside the Prime Day cycle
highlights.body: Mushroom coffee pricing held steady through the event, so this week is pure merit scoring and the order is unchanged.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週機能蘑菇咖啡排序維持原樣，最近這輪實測也再次說明前三名為什麼坐在這些位置。MUD\WTR Rise Cacao 守住第一，想要一杯真正的咖啡替代品，而不是咖啡加蘑菇的人，我還是推這款。可可加瑪薩拉香料茶的基底給它順口溫潤的味道，單喝就很好喝，六種蘑菇的配方劑量抓得不錯，35 毫克咖啡因帶來穩定的專注，又不會有那種尖峰式的心悸。這個平衡就是它穩坐第一的原因。Four Sigmatic Focus Ground 守住第二，給想慢慢轉換的人最合適，它沖起來就像真咖啡，裡面融了猴頭菇跟白樺茸，到現在還是同類裡銷量大幅領先的選擇。Ryze 守住第三，是 CP 值跟配方的亮點，六菇配方一份大約三十幾塊台幣，最近測試的人覺得它溶解得乾淨，幾乎沒有顆粒感。蘑菇咖啡不在 Prime Day 的促銷圈內，所以價格很穩，這週靠實力打分。我的建議很一致，要完整換掉咖啡選 MUD\WTR，想輕鬆過渡選 Four Sigmatic，要最強配方加最好價格就看 Ryze。

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise Cacao 守住第一
highlights.body: 順口的可可加香料茶基底，六菇配方劑量抓得好，35 毫克咖啡因帶來穩定專注又不心悸。真正的咖啡替代品。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic Focus 最好過渡
highlights.body: 第二名沖起來像真咖啡，融了猴頭菇跟白樺茸，到現在還是同類銷量大幅領先的選擇。

highlights.title: Ryze 是 CP 跟配方亮點
highlights.body: 第三名六菇配方加一份約三十幾塊台幣，最近測試的人覺得溶解乾淨、幾乎沒顆粒感。

highlights.title: 不在 Prime Day 圈內
highlights.body: 蘑菇咖啡價格在活動期間很穩，所以這週純靠實力打分，排序維持不變。

references.title: MUD WTR vs. RYZE Mushroom Coffee (I Tried Both): Who Wins In 2026?
MUD\WTR vs Ryze | Coffee Alternatives Throwdown (2026)
Everyday Dose vs. RYZE vs. MUD\WTR vs. Four Sigmatic: Which Mushroom Coffee Wins?

en.commentary: MUD WTR Rise Cacao keeps my top spot because it delivers the most complete package in this category: about 35 mg of caffeine for a gentle lift, a genuinely transparent 2,240 mg functional mushroom blend, and a cacao-chai base that mixes into something I actually look forward to drinking. The 2026 head-to-head coverage keeps landing on the same theme, that MUD WTR wins on transparency and predictable per-serving value while its rivals compete on price and coffee-likeness. I nudged its value score up a tenth this week because the 90-serving bag brings the cost down to around 89 cents a cup on subscription, which is strong for a blend this well documented. Four Sigmatic Focus stays second on taste and clean sourcing, the pick if you want something that drinks closest to real coffee. Ryze holds third and remains my value and convenience champion, with the fastest prep and the strongest functional blend score, though it keeps its mushroom breakdown under wraps. Everyday Dose stays fourth for anyone who wants the smoothest, most latte-like cup. No new launch this week shifts the order, so I am carrying the standings forward. If you are switching off straight coffee for the first time, start with MUD WTR, and try Ryze if cost per cup is your deciding factor.

highlights.title: MUD WTR stays on top
highlights.body: Transparent 2,240 mg blend, a gentle 35 mg caffeine lift, and a genuinely enjoyable cacao-chai base keep it the most complete pick.

highlights.title: Best value per cup
highlights.body: The 90-serving bag lands around 89 cents a cup on subscription, so I raised MUD WTR's value score a tenth this week.

highlights.title: Closest to real coffee
highlights.body: Four Sigmatic Focus holds second on taste and clean sourcing for people who want the most coffee-like drink.

highlights.title: Convenience champion
highlights.body: Ryze stays third with the fastest prep and the strongest functional-blend score, my pick when cost per cup decides it.

zh-tw.commentary: MUD WTR Rise Cacao 繼續坐我的第一，因為它在這個類別給的是最完整的組合：約 35 mg 咖啡因給你溫和的提神、一份真正透明標示的 2,240 mg 機能菇類配方，還有一個可可加印度香料的基底，泡起來是我真的會期待喝的味道。2026 年的各種對決文章結論都指向同一件事，MUD WTR 贏在透明度跟每份價格好抓，對手則是拚價格跟像不像咖啡。這週我把它的 CP 值分數加了 0.1，因為 90 份裝的大包訂閱下來一杯大概 89 美分，以這麼詳實標示的配方來說很划算。Four Sigmatic Focus 靠味道跟乾淨原料守第二，想喝起來最接近真咖啡就選它。Ryze 守第三，還是我的 CP 值跟方便性冠軍，沖泡最快、機能配方分數最高，只是它的菇類比例一直不公開。Everyday Dose 守第四，適合想要最滑順、最像拿鐵口感的人。這週沒有新品撼動順序，我就直接沿用。第一次想從純咖啡轉過來就從 MUD WTR 開始，看重一杯多少錢就試 Ryze。

highlights.title: MUD WTR 續坐第一
highlights.body: 透明標示的 2,240 mg 配方、溫和的 35 mg 咖啡因、加上真的好喝的可可香料基底，讓它是最完整的選擇。

highlights.title: 單杯最划算
highlights.body: 90 份大包訂閱下來一杯約 89 美分，所以這週我把 MUD WTR 的 CP 值分數上調 0.1。

highlights.title: 最像真咖啡
highlights.body: Four Sigmatic Focus 靠味道跟乾淨原料守第二，想喝最像咖啡的就選它。

highlights.title: 方便冠軍
highlights.body: Ryze 守第三，沖泡最快、機能配方分數最高，看重一杯成本時我就推它。

references.title: Best Mushroom Coffee | Our Top 6 in 2026

Everyday Dose vs. RYZE vs. MUD/WTR vs. Four Sigmatic

en.commentary: MUD\WTR Rise Cacao stays my number one this week, and I keep coming back to it for the same reason. It is the most complete daily cup here, with a chai-like cacao, turmeric, and six-mushroom blend that reads as a smooth 35mg of caffeine, gentle enough to skip the jitters yet steady enough to carry a morning. A 9.5 energy score and a 9.5 ease score reflect how easily it fits into a routine. Reviews this month reinforce the top of my board rather than shake it. Testers continue to call RYZE the closest to traditional coffee among the mushroom blends, and its six-mushroom formula and quick shipping keep it a confident rank three on a 9.5 value and 9.6 blend score. Four Sigmatic holds rank two on taste, since its Focus ground is the one I hand to people transitioning off regular coffee, and its transparent use of fruiting-body extracts keeps its purity high at 9.3. Everyday Dose stays at rank four for a genuinely great cup that leans a bit pricier per serving. One note worth flagging for buyers this month, MUD\WTR customer service came up as the slowest to respond in cross-brand testing, so lean on the subscription controls in the app rather than email if you need a change. For pure functional-blend depth, OM Mushroom holds rank five.

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise keeps the crown
highlights.body: Its cacao, turmeric, and six-mushroom blend at a smooth 35mg caffeine earns a 9.5 energy score and stays my top daily cup.

highlights.title: RYZE tastes closest to real coffee
highlights.body: Testers this month again call it the most coffee-like mushroom blend, and its 9.5 value plus fast shipping hold it at rank three.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic is the transition pick
highlights.body: The Focus ground is what I hand people leaving regular coffee, and fruiting-body extracts keep purity at 9.3.

highlights.title: Watch MUD\WTR support response times
highlights.body: Cross-brand testing flagged its customer service as the slowest to reply, so use the app subscription controls for changes.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 MUD\WTR Rise Cacao 依舊是我的第一名，我一再回頭喝它就是同一個理由。它是這裡最完整的日常一杯，用可可、薑黃跟六種菇的配方調出偏印度香料茶的味道，咖啡因只有 35mg，喝起來很順，溫和到不會讓你手抖心悸，卻又穩得足以撐起一個早上。能量 9.5 分、沖泡便利 9.5 分，正好說明它多容易融進日常。這個月的評測比較像是幫我的榜首加固，而不是掀桌。試喝的人依然說 RYZE 是這些菇類配方裡最接近傳統咖啡味的，加上它六種菇的配方跟出貨快，穩穩守住第三名，價值 9.5 分、配方 9.6 分。Four Sigmatic 靠味道守第二，它的 Focus 研磨款是我最常拿給正在戒掉一般咖啡的人喝的一款，而且它老實用子實體萃取，純度維持在 9.3 這種高分。Everyday Dose 留在第四，一杯真的好喝，只是每份成本稍微貴一點。這個月有一點要提醒想買的人，跨品牌測試裡 MUD\WTR 的客服回覆速度墊底，所以要改訂閱或調整，直接在 App 裡動比寄信快得多。純看功能性配方的深度，OM Mushroom 守住第五。

highlights.title: MUD\WTR Rise 續戴冠軍
highlights.body: 可可、薑黃加六種菇、順口的 35mg 咖啡因，拿到能量 9.5 分，還是我最推的日常一杯。

highlights.title: RYZE 最接近真咖啡味
highlights.body: 這個月試喝的人再次說它是最像咖啡的菇類配方，價值 9.5 分加上出貨快，守住第三。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 是戒咖啡過渡首選
highlights.body: Focus 研磨款是我最常拿給要戒一般咖啡的人喝的，子實體萃取讓純度維持 9.3。

highlights.title: 留意 MUD\WTR 客服回覆速度
highlights.body: 跨品牌測試點出它的客服回覆最慢，要改訂閱直接用 App 操作比寄信快。

en.commentary: MUD/WTR Rise Cacao keeps my top spot, and a fresh 2026 taste test backs the call, it scored highest at 4.5 out of 5 for its smooth chai-cacao flavor with the mushrooms well masked. That is the whole game with a coffee alternative, if it does not taste good you will not drink it past week one, and this one you genuinely look forward to. At roughly 35mg of caffeine plus 2,240mg of functional mushrooms it gives you a calm, jitter-free lift, and it fully discloses the dose of each species, which I value in a category full of proprietary blends. I nudged its taste score up to reflect the win. Four Sigmatic Focus holds second as the best pick for people who want an actual coffee flavor, its ground format brews like normal coffee with lion's mane for focus. Ryze stays third and remains the value and blend leader, a 6-mushroom formula at about $1.20 a serving that is the easiest switch for committed coffee drinkers, though the taste runs slightly more bitter. Everyday Dose sits fourth as the smooth crowd-pleaser. No ranking changes beyond the taste bump. Taste and transparency continue to decide this list, and MUD/WTR wins both.

highlights.title: MUD/WTR won the taste test

highlights.title: Transparent dosing
highlights.body: It discloses the dose of each mushroom species, a real edge in a category full of proprietary blends that only list a total.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic tastes like coffee
highlights.body: The ground format brews like normal coffee with lion's mane for focus, the pick for people who want a real coffee flavor.

highlights.title: Ryze is the value switch
highlights.body: A 6-mushroom blend at about $1.20 a serving makes it the easiest change for committed coffee drinkers, holding rank three.

zh-tw.commentary: MUD/WTR Rise Cacao 守住我的第一，2026 一場新的試喝也印證了這個判斷，它以 4.5 分（滿分 5）拿下最高分，靠的是滑順的印度香料加可可風味，蘑菇味被蓋得很好。對咖啡替代品來說這就是全部的重點，如果不好喝，你撐不過第一週，而這杯你是真的會期待喝的。大約 35mg 咖啡因加 2,240mg 機能性蘑菇，給你一個平穩、不心悸的提振，而且它把每個菌種的劑量都標清楚，在這個滿是專有配方的品類裡我很看重這點。我把它的口味分往上調了一點反映這次勝出。Four Sigmatic Focus 守第二，是給想要真咖啡味的人的首選，研磨粉能像一般咖啡一樣沖，加了猴頭菇幫助專注。Ryze 排第三，還是 CP 值跟配方的領頭羊，6 種蘑菇配方，一份約台幣 38 元，是死忠咖啡族最好上手的轉換，只是味道稍微苦一點。Everyday Dose 排第四，是滑順的大眾討喜款。除了口味微調外排名沒動。口味跟透明度繼續決定這份榜單，而 MUD/WTR 兩項都贏。

highlights.title: MUD/WTR 贏了試喝
highlights.body: 2026 試喝以 4.5 分拿最高，靠滑順香料可可風味把蘑菇味蓋得很好，口味分因此上調。

highlights.title: 劑量透明
highlights.body: 它把每個菌種劑量都標清楚，在滿是只標總量的專有配方品類裡是真正的優勢。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 有咖啡味
highlights.body: 研磨粉能像一般咖啡沖，加猴頭菇幫專注，是想要真咖啡味者的選擇。

references.title: Best Mushroom Coffee (2026): Reviews, Rankings & Taste-Test Winners
MUD WTR vs. RYZE Mushroom Coffee (I Tried Both): Who Wins In 2026?
Best Mushroom Coffee | Our Top 6 in 2026

en.commentary: MUD WTR Rise Cacao stays my number one this week, and the July comparisons keep confirming why. It remains the gold standard reviewers reach for, with the most transparent mushroom dosing and a cacao-and-chai profile that I actually look forward to at 5am. The sustained energy is the real draw. About 35mg of caffeine gives me a calm lift without the crash, and after weeks of daily mugs that steadiness is what keeps it on top. Four Sigmatic Focus Ground holds second because it drinks the most like real coffee. If you want the ritual of a brewed cup with functional mushrooms folded in, this is the smoothest bridge, and its purity testing stays excellent. Ryze sits third and it is the value champion of the group. Reviewers keep noting it delivers a comparable mushroom serving to MUD WTR at a lower price, with a coffee-forward taste that newcomers find easier to accept. If budget leads your decision, Ryze is where I point you. Everyday Dose stays fourth for its creamy, approachable cup and quick prep, and Om keeps fifth on the strength of a genuinely broad functional blend. Laird Superfood Perform remains my pick when energy and performance matter most. Down the list, VitaCup and Clevr reward anyone who wants the easiest possible preparation. No rank changes this week. The MUD WTR versus Ryze debate is still transparency and taste against price, and each holds its ground cleanly.

highlights.title: MUD WTR Rise Cacao holds first
highlights.body: July comparisons still call it the gold standard. Transparent mushroom dosing and a calm lift from about 35mg of caffeine keep it my daily number one.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic drinks most like coffee
highlights.body: For anyone who wants the ritual of a brewed cup with mushrooms folded in, this is the smoothest bridge, and its purity testing stays excellent.

highlights.title: Ryze is the value champion
highlights.body: Reviewers note a comparable mushroom serving to MUD WTR at a lower price, with a coffee-forward taste newcomers accept easily. Budget buyers should start here.

highlights.title: Laird Perform for energy first
highlights.body: When sustained energy and performance lead your decision, Laird Superfood Perform remains the blend I reach for in this group.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 MUD WTR Rise Cacao 還是我的第一名，七月的各家比較也持續印證原因。它還是評測者一致認定的標竿，蘑菇劑量最透明，可可加印度香料的風味是我清晨五點還真心期待的那種。真正的賣點是持久的能量。大約 35mg 咖啡因給我一種平穩的提神，不會後座力崩掉，連喝幾週下來，就是這份穩定讓它守住第一。Four Sigmatic Focus Ground 守住第二，因為它喝起來最像真咖啡。如果你想要沖一杯咖啡的儀式感，又把功能性蘑菇融進去，這是最順的橋樑，純度檢測也一直很棒。Ryze 排第三，是這組的性價比冠軍。評測者一直提到，它的蘑菇份量跟 MUD WTR 相當，價格卻更低，咖啡味更明顯，新手更容易接受。如果預算是你的第一考量，我會指你往 Ryze 去。Everyday Dose 守第四，靠的是滑順好入口跟沖泡快。Om 守第五，靠的是真的很廣的功能性配方。想要能量跟表現時，Laird Superfood Perform 還是我的首選。往下看，VitaCup 跟 Clevr 適合想要最省事沖泡的人。這週沒動排名。MUD WTR 對上 Ryze 的辯論，還是透明度跟風味對上價格，兩邊都穩穩守住。

highlights.title: MUD WTR Rise Cacao 續坐第一
highlights.body: 七月比較仍稱它為標竿。透明的蘑菇劑量加上約 35mg 咖啡因帶來的平穩提神，讓它守住我的日常第一。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 最像真咖啡
highlights.body: 想要沖一杯咖啡的儀式感又把蘑菇融進去，這是最順的橋樑，純度檢測也一直很棒。

highlights.title: Ryze 是性價比冠軍
highlights.body: 評測者指它蘑菇份量與 MUD WTR 相當、價格更低，咖啡味更明顯，新手好接受。預算優先就從這裡開始。

highlights.title: Laird Perform 能量優先
highlights.body: 當持久能量跟表現是你的首要考量，Laird Superfood Perform 還是我在這組裡會伸手去拿的配方。

references.title: The Best Mushroom Coffee Brands of 2026 [Tested by a Dietitian]
Best Mushroom Coffee Brands in 2026: Complete Comparison Guide
Best Mushroom Coffee of 2026: 7 Picks Tested & Reviewed

en.commentary: MUD/WTR Rise stays my top pick this week, and the reason is still the same after months of daily use. The masala chai and cacao base makes it the one blend I actually reach for in the morning without bracing myself, and the 35mg caffeine hit lands smooth with no crash by mid-afternoon. That combination of drinkability and sustained energy is what keeps it ahead. The one adjustment I made this week is bumping RYZE up a touch on taste. The 2026 review circuit keeps calling it the closest thing to a normal smooth instant coffee, and my own cup confirms it masks the earthy mushroom note better than almost anything at its price. RYZE remains the value and functional-blend champion, so if you want maximum mushroom per dollar it is the smart buy. Four Sigmatic Focus holds second on the strength of clean sourcing and genuinely good flavor for a ground format you brew like real coffee. I keep recommending it to people who refuse to give up their drip machine. The interesting story this month is format. Ready-to-drink cans and freeze-dried whole-bean instants are entering the category, and I expect that to reshuffle the value tier later in the year. For now the ranked ten are all blends I would happily restock, and the top three are the ones I trust to deliver focus without the jitters.

highlights.title: MUD/WTR earns the top spot on daily drinkability
highlights.body: The chai-cacao base and gentle 35mg caffeine make this the blend I actually want every morning, with steady energy and no afternoon crash.

highlights.title: RYZE is the value and blend champion
highlights.body: It masks the earthy mushroom taste better than anything near its price and packs the strongest functional blend, so it is the pick for maximum mushroom per dollar.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic wins for coffee purists
highlights.body: Clean sourcing plus a ground format you brew like real coffee makes it my go-to recommendation for anyone unwilling to leave their drip machine.

highlights.title: New formats are coming
highlights.body: Ready-to-drink cans and freeze-dried whole-bean instants are entering the category in 2026, and I expect them to shake up the value tier as the year goes on.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 MUD/WTR Rise 放第一，理由跟前幾個月一樣扎實。它的印度香料茶加可可基底，是唯一一款我早上會主動想喝，而且不用先做心理準備的機能咖啡。35 毫克咖啡因下肚很順，到下午也不會突然沒電。這種好入口又能撐一整天的組合，就是它一直穩坐冠軍的原因。這週我唯一動的是把 RYZE 的口味分數往上調一點。2026 年一輪一輪的評測都說它最接近一般順口的即溶咖啡，我自己實際泡一杯也認同，它蓋掉那股土味的功力，在同價位裡幾乎沒對手。RYZE 依然是 CP 值跟機能配方的王者，你想用最少的錢買到最多菇類成分，選它就對了。Four Sigmatic Focus 守住第二，靠的是乾淨的原料來源，還有研磨式那種可以像沖真咖啡一樣沖的好味道，我一直推薦給那些死都不肯放棄手沖機的朋友。這個月比較有意思的是包裝形式。即飲罐裝跟冷凍乾燥全豆即溶都開始進場，我猜下半年 CP 值這一段會被重新洗牌。目前榜上這十款我都願意回購，前三名則是我最信任、喝了會專注又不會手抖的選擇。

highlights.title: MUD/WTR 靠每天都想喝奪冠
highlights.body: 香料茶加可可基底，配上溫和的 35 毫克咖啡因，是我早上真的會想喝的那一款，能量穩定，下午也不會突然斷電。

highlights.title: RYZE 是 CP 值與配方雙料王
highlights.body: 同價位裡它蓋土味的功力最強，機能菇類配方也最紮實，想用最少的錢買到最多菇類成分就選它。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic 最適合手沖派
highlights.body: 乾淨的原料加上可以像沖真咖啡一樣沖的研磨形式，我都推薦給那些捨不得放下手沖機的人。

highlights.title: 新包裝形式正在進場
highlights.body: 即飲罐裝跟冷凍乾燥全豆即溶在 2026 年陸續上市，我看下半年 CP 值這一段會被重新洗牌。

references.title: Best Mushroom Coffee (2026): Reviews, Rankings & Taste-Test Winners
Best Mushroom Coffee | Our Top 6 in 2026
Best Mushroom Coffee Brands in 2026: Complete Comparison Guide

en.commentary: I held every rank this week because the top of this category is settled, and this July's reviews keep confirming it. MUD/WTR Rise stays my number one for the same reasons it earned the spot. The cacao-forward blend actually tastes good, the energy lands smooth without the jitter of a full coffee, and the prep is genuinely quick. When a functional drink is this easy to actually keep drinking every morning, it wins on the only metric that matters, which is the one you stick with. Four Sigmatic Focus holds second on flavor and its clean Lion's Mane and Chaga profile, and it is the one I hand people who want something closest to a traditional cup. RYZE stays third, and I keep respecting the breadth of its six-mushroom stack at 2,000mg per serving. That is the widest functional blend here, and its 9.6 blend score reflects that. The interesting shift I am watching is the move toward ready-to-drink cans this year, with new RTD entries appearing, but nothing shipping yet that unseats these established picks on taste and consistency. Everyday Dose stays a strong fourth for anyone who wants a nootropic-leaning cup with collagen. My advice for July is simple. Start with the flavor that will actually get you to drink it daily, because the best mushroom coffee is the one that becomes a habit. For most people that path runs straight through the top three.

highlights.title: MUD/WTR Rise stays number one
highlights.body: A cacao-forward blend that genuinely tastes good, smooth jitter-free energy, and quick prep. It wins on the only metric that counts, the one you keep drinking.

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic Focus for coffee purists
highlights.body: The cleanest Lion's Mane and Chaga profile and the flavor closest to a traditional cup. My pick for anyone easing into the category.

highlights.title: RYZE has the widest blend
highlights.body: A six-mushroom stack at 2,000mg per serving earns its 9.6 blend score. The broadest functional mix on the list.

highlights.title: Watch the RTD wave
highlights.body: Ready-to-drink mushroom coffee cans are arriving this year, but nothing shipping yet unseats these established picks on taste and consistency.

zh-tw.commentary: 我這禮拜全部維持原排名，因為這品類的前段已經定型，這個七月的評測也一直在印證這件事。MUD/WTR Rise 繼續我的第一，理由跟它當初拿下這位置一樣。可可調性的配方是真的好喝，能量來得順、不像整杯咖啡那樣心悸，沖泡又快。一杯機能飲能做到讓你每天早上真的願意繼續喝，它就贏在唯一重要的指標，就是你會不會一直喝下去。Four Sigmatic Focus 守住第二，靠風味跟那個乾淨的猴頭菇加靈芝配方，想要最接近傳統咖啡口感的人，我就遞這杯給他。RYZE 排第三，我一直很服它那套六種菇、每份 2000mg 的廣度。這是榜上最廣的機能配方，9.6 的配方分數就是這麼來的。我在觀察的有趣變化是今年往即飲罐裝走的趨勢，有新的即飲品牌冒出來，但目前還沒有出貨的產品能在口味跟穩定度上把這些老將擠下來。Everyday Dose 穩守第四，適合想要偏益智、又加膠原蛋白那杯的人。七月我的建議很簡單。從那個會讓你真的每天喝的口味開始選，因為最好的養生咖啡就是變成習慣的那杯。對多數人來說，這條路直接穿過前三名。

highlights.title: MUD/WTR Rise 續坐第一
highlights.body: 可可調性配方是真的好喝，能量順又不心悸，沖泡快。它贏在唯一重要的指標，就是你會一直喝下去的那杯。

highlights.title: Four Sigmatic Focus 給咖啡純粹派
highlights.body: 最乾淨的猴頭菇加靈芝配方，口感最接近傳統咖啡。想入門的人我就推這杯。

highlights.title: RYZE 配方最廣
highlights.body: 六種菇、每份 2000mg，撐起 9.6 的配方分數。榜上最廣的機能組合。

highlights.title: 留意即飲這波
highlights.body: 今年即飲罐裝養生咖啡陸續登場，但目前還沒有出貨的產品能在口味跟穩定度上擠下這些老將。
